changelog:
• Refreshed the Sentence editor with a cleaner premium dark interface, improved spacing, slimmer navigation, and more consistent matte black/silver styling.
• Redesigned Script Explorer with a cleaner layout, improved folder/file presentation, smoother hover animations, better sorting, and fixed collapsed folders leaving empty scroll space.
• Simplified Script Explorer by removing unnecessary counters, filters, search bar, and heavy button backgrounds for a cleaner minimal workflow.
• Improved New File, New Folder, and GitHub import dialogs with a more modern premium style and fixed dispatcher errors when opening them.
• Improved GitHub import visibility and restored proper button behavior in Script Explorer.
• Updated Instance Explorer with a premium dark style, removed default blue selection/hover colors, improved readability, and matched its panel colors with the Script Preview Editor.
• Restored the original LuaU - LSP badge style in the editor.
• Improved editor UI details including icons, corner radius, panel colors, hover effects, animations, and overall visual consistency.
